Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Marketing_Resources.asp

# Validation and Market Research Route to SBDC

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
You are in Validation. The priority is customer, market, competitor, pricing, and feasibility evidence. The SBDC Marketing/Market Research resources and advising can help you gather industry and market information before committing major money.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
